one_line_summary: Well-documented idea, but the shipped feature is brittle, incomplete, and poorly verified.
strengths: ADR exists early and explains the six-phase Driver/Navigator flow
Feature is wired into CLI, slash command, and tool registry
README/wiki/help text were updated with usage examples
weaknesses: Implementation is mostly prompt orchestration with weak validation and likely broken registry/class wiring
Tests do not cover the six-phase contract end-to-end and contain obvious import/runtime issues
Code quality is poor: stray .tmp file, inconsistent class names, unused imports, and session shows unverified/broken state
